text: Tracks 15 to 18 for the Act 3 Ascent set land on the tenth of October.
Fourteen of twenty two delivered and in the build. Eight to go before launch.
Sending the stems for the marsh theme now.
Sounds great, that fits the November Early Access window.
Invoice for track 14 going out through the usual platform, five hundred.
The finale and title themes come after the Ascent set.
Love the Hollow King motif, it carries the whole fight.
Can we push the credits theme to the twentieth of November?
Fine by me, credits are last anyway.
Playtest tonight at seven, build is up on Discord.
